chain.thought: Explanation: Counting singles that charted on the Billboard Hot 100 by album: 24/7 has five (positions 50, 42, 7, 23, 61), Swingin' has two (6, 31), and The Way I Am has one (27; “Endlessly” did not chart). Thus, 24/7 has the most top singles.

judge_thought: Explanation: The album 24/7 has the most distinct singles that charted: “summergirls,” “24/7,” “i like it,” “sunshine,” and “never 2 much of u” (5 total). Swingin’ has two (“romeo,” “gentle”), and The Way I Am has one (“ooh child,” while “endlessly” did not chart). Therefore, 24/7 had the most top singles.
